description: Composition Blue mix-and-match print kurta made of 100% cotton, has a round neck with sequin detailing, lace and sequin detailing at the bib with mild pleats below, and has three-quarter sleeves Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately in cold water Do not bleach Dry in shade Medium to hot iron Designed to celebrate womanhood in all its facets, this kurta from biba is inspired by traditional Indian print that makes it a special wardrobe favourite. The soft cotton fabric offers exemplary comfort, while the colourful embroidery adds zing to the garment. Team it with jeans or leggings, chunky accessories and heeled sandals. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'7" and chest 32"
